title: Inventory drought and food insecurity data sources
outcome: Dated source inventory separating rainfall, vegetation, market, IPC, and unusable sources.
validation_method: Reviewer checks sources for URL, methodology, grain.
done_condition: At least five sources classified with explicit reasons.

title: Validate drought signals against food insecurity outcomes
outcome: Lead-time analysis correlating rainfall, vegetation, and price signals to IPC phase deterioration.
validation_method: Replicator reruns with alternative time windows and confirms skill metrics.
done_condition: Signal validation includes lead-time distributions, hit rates, and false-alarm rates with replication.

title: Profile false-alarm rates at actionable lead times
outcome: False-alarm profiles showing rates at 1, 3, and 6-month leads with cost-of-error analysis.
validation_method: Replicator confirms false-alarm rate sensitivity to threshold choices.
done_condition: False-alarm profiles include lead-time degradation and explicit caveats with replication.

title: Red-team misuse of food-insecurity forecasts
outcome: Failure-mode review for aid-diversion and false-confidence risks.
validation_method: Reviewer confirms mitigations or blocks, then replicated.

title: Check whether outputs match humanitarian decision needs
outcome: Field-facing review of whether signals change humanitarian response responsibly.
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies decision, user, misuse risk, then replicated.
done_condition: Named user, named decision, non-use cases, replicated review.
